mapper.select:
select ts.name,tt.topic_name,fs.special_name,fs.trial_id,s.analysis_sum,m.analysis_count from fr_special fs left join tb_species ts on fs.species_id=ts.species_id left join tb_topic tt on tt.topic_id=fs.topic_id left join( select s.special_id,count(*) as analysis_sum from fr_slide s where s.del_flag='0' group by s.special_id ) s on s.special_id=fs.special_id left join( select s.special_id,count(*) as analysis_count from fr_slide s where s.del_flag='0' and s.ai_status>0 group by s.special_id ) m on m.special_id=fs.special_id
fs.del_flag='0'
and fs.special_id IN
#{id}
